title: Reverse Mergers: Under which circumstances would a merger be classified as a...
summary: Identify the conditions under which a merger qualifies as a reverse merger for going public.
prompt: Under which circumstances would a merger be classified as a reverse merger?

options.text: A reverse merger allows a private company to go public by merging with a public
A formal tender offer to shareholders

solution: A reverse merger allows a private company to go public by merging with a public shell, providing a quicker and less costly alternative to an initial public offering (IPO).
